subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-10-29
subcodes.first_line: It is not a matter of our reluctance to pay one dollar but of our unwillingness to be dependent on bodily comfort. We must be equal to the hardships of traveling
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر خوابگاهی را یکدالر دادن نقلی نیست لکن ما میخواهیم تقیدی براحت تن نداشته باشیم
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @disregarding bodily comfort
